overall.description: Game engine footage from a ship simulator showing a first-person view from the vessel's bridge. The ship navigates through choppy coastal waters under gray overcast skies, with functional navigation displays including a rotating radar and electronic chart plotter visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigating open coastal waters

agents.ego_description: operating the ship's navigation systems and steering through moderate seas while monitoring the radar and chart displays

entered.detail: red-painted bow of the vessel with anchor equipment and railings, viewed from the bridge
metal safety railing along the left side of the foredeck
metal safety railing along the right side of the foredeck
circular radar display with rotating yellow sweep showing surrounding waters
colorful nautical chart showing coastline topography and depth contours
blue-screen display showing ship systems and telemetry data

segments.scene_description: The view from a ship's bridge shows the vessel's bow cutting through choppy gray waters under an overcast sky. Three navigation monitors display radar, charts, and systems data overhead. The ship maintains a steady course through the moderate seas with no other vessels in sight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as the vessel navigates through a desolate, choppy seascape. It begins with the bow cutting through gray, turbulent waters under a heavy overcast sky. As the ship maintains its course, the camera captures the rhythmic motion of the moderate seas stretching toward a vacant horizon. The scene remains focused on the forward trajectory, framed by the glow of three overhead navigation monitors displaying radar, charts, and systems data.
